ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wine_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine class */,
  "origin" TEXT /* The region or country of origin */,
  "grape_varieties" TEXT /* The main grape varieties used in the class */,
  "production_method" TEXT /* The method of production (e.g., traditional, modern) */,
  "ageing_potential" TEXT /* The potential for ageing (e.g., short, medium, long) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical property */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sample */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical property */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the chemical property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the property */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* The method used to test the chemical property */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* The date when the chemical property was tested */,
  "test_lab" TEXT /* The laboratory where the test was conducted */,
  "version" INTEGER /* To track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensory_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensory attribute */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sample */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensory attribute */,
  "attribute_value" REAL /* Value of the sensory attribute */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the attribute */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* The method used to evaluate the sensory attribute */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* The date when the sensory attribute was evaluated */,
  "evaluator" TEXT /* The name of the person who evaluated the attribute */,
  "version" INTEGER /* To track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production batch */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sample */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "production_location" TEXT /* Location of production */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Size of the batch */,
  "batch_status" TEXT /* The status of the batch (e.g., in production, completed, on hold) */,
  "quality_grade" TEXT /* The quality grade of the batch */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the batch */,
  "version" INTEGER /* To track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality test */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sample */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_lab" TEXT /* The laboratory where the test was conducted */,
  "tester" TEXT /* The name of the person who conducted the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the test in minutes */,
  "version" INTEGER /* To track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, quality analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the wine sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the wine sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the session in minutes */,
  "version" INTEGER /* To track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
